texto: The future of the world belongs to the youth of the world, and it is from the youth and not from the old that the fire of life will warm and enlighten the world. It is your privilege to breathe the breath of life into the dry bones of many around you.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Mann sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The future of the world belongs to the youth of the world, and it is from the youth and not from …” articula vida, youth, world em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como youth e world.
